subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord and my Support! I beseech Thee by the splendors of Thy Countenance and by the manifestations of the Exponents of Thy Cause to grant me success in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی و سندی اسئلک بانوار وجهک و بظهورات مظاهر امرک بان توفقنی علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
